name: every default catalog entry maps to a shipped fetcher script under pr-corpus/fetchers/ keyed by source id
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/list-default-sources.sh" --format ids 2>out.txt && missing=0 && for id in $(cat out.txt); do [ -f "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/fetchers/${id}.sh" ] || { echo "missing: $id" 1>&2; missing=1; }; done && [ "$missing" = "0" ] && echo ok 1>&2
